typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	DataTable as string (),
	SchemeId as integer (),
	ValuationDate as timestamp (),
	Cfg_ImportRunId as integer (),
	Cfg_ServiceHostTcpUri as string ()
}

source(output(
		ImportRunId as integer,
		SchemeId as integer,
		ValuationDate as timestamp,
		MarketValue as double,
		Name as string,
		FundGrouping as string,
		Namespace as string,
		ValuationDateConverted as date
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT        a.ImportRunId, a.SchemeId, a.ValuationDate, CONVERT(DATE, a.ValuationDate) ValuationDateConverted, a.MarketValue, f.Name, f.FundGrouping, f.Namespace FROM            Staging.ChannelAssetTransform AS a LEFT OUTER JOIN                          Staging.FundDetail AS f ON a.ImportRunId = f.ImportRunId AND a.Namespace = f.Namespace WHERE a.ImportRunId= ?',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> Transform	source(output(
		Id as integer,
		Date as date,
		SchemeId as integer,
		MarketValue as double,
		IsCompleted as boolean,
		Suspect as boolean
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'select * from Asset.BagelDailyValuation',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LookupDVLKPTABLE
Transform derive(UtcDate = notConvertedectfunctiondatetimegetUtcDate()) ~> AddColumn
AddColumn,LookupDVLKPTABLE lookup(Transform@SchemeId == LookupDVLKPTABLE@SchemeId && ValuationDateConverted == Date,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> LookupDV
LookupDV select(mapColumn(
		UtcDate = UtcDate,
		ImportRunId = ImportRunId,
		SchemeId = Transform@SchemeId,
		ValuationDate = ValuationDate,
		MarketValue = Transform@MarketValue,
		Name = Name,
		FundGrouping = FundGrouping,
		Namespace = Namespace,
		ValuationDateConverted = ValuationDateConverted,
		Id = Id,
		Date = Date,
		IsCompleted = IsCompleted,
		Suspect = Suspect
	),
	 skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	 skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> LookupDVSelect
LookupDVSelect split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LookupDVIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
LookupDVIsMatch@NotMatch sink(input(
		MarketValue as double,
		CreatedUTCDate as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		SchemeId as integer,
		Namespace as string,
		Date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy'
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		MarketValue,
		CreatedUTCDate = UtcDate,
		SchemeId,
		Namespace,
		Date = ValuationDateConverted)) ~> Audit
